narrative: Hormuz tensions and a hot US CPI report drive a dollar rally as WTI crude surges above $100 — gold lower -0.28%; equities -0.12%; DXY +0.31%; VIX 18.0. USD/JPY firms to 157.56 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite geopolitical risk premiums. GBP/USD retreats to 1.3542 as sellers seize control following political instability and US inflation data. Watch the Fed Chair confirmation vote on Wednesday for further USD directional cues.
